_patch_meta.description: Consolidation patch addressing three structural issues (H3/H4/H7) from v13 and completing analytical routing of 7 P-status verses and 4 confirmed UT verses. Built from grounded verse readings.

sections.A_h3_vcg_term_additions: 18 VCG_ADD_TERM operations — adds secondary terms to VCG term sets to resolve cross-term H3 violations
sections.B_h4_secondary_subgroup_links: 20 MTI_SUBGROUP_ADD operations — adds secondary mti_term_subgroup rows for terms with multi-subgroup verse pools
sections.C_h7_liparos_vcg: 1 VCG_CREATE operation — creates liparos-001 (Rev 18:14, M46-B) to resolve H7 for G3045
sections.D_vcnew_ut_verses: 4 VCNEW operations — creates verse_context rows for 4 confirmed UT verses
sections.E_vcrevise_p_verses: 13 VCREVISE operations — routes 7 P-status verses (with duplicate vc_ids)

_patch_meta.execution_order: Apply A → B → C → D → E in order. C (liparos VCG creation) must precede any reference to the new liparos VCG id.
notes: Section A adds terms to VCG term sets. This is a vcg_term table operation, not a verse_context operation.
Section B adds mti_term_subgroup rows. Each row is (mti_term_id, subgroup_id) pair — use existing pattern from primary assignments.

Section C creates new VCG 4702-001 for liparos. After creation, re-route Rev 18:14 (vc_id=64258) from group_id=3709 to the new liparos VCG id, and remove the liparos entry from VCG 7581-001 term set (reverse the H3 fix for liparos if it was applied).
Sections D and E resolve the remaining 7 P-status and 4 UT verses. Some vr_ids appear as both old and new vc_id pairs (duplicates from the extraction) — CC to apply once and note duplicates.
3 UT verses remain unidentified (vr_ids unknown). These will surface in v14 if they exist. CC to flag if found during execution.
After applying, regenerate v14 report to confirm H3=0, H4=0, H7=0, H2=0, P=0, UT=3 (remaining unidentified).

section_A_h3_vcg_term_additions.basis: Deu 31:20 da.shen (grown fat) routes to 4697-002 because it evidences same prosperity-apostasy pattern. da.shen must be in VCG term set to resolve H3.
Pro 15:30 da.shen (good news refreshes bones) routed to 7583-003 as received blessing enriching inner person. da.shen must be in VCG term set.
Pro 11:4 hon (riches do not profit in day of wrath) routed to 7586-001 as misplaced trust/failure. hon must be in VCG term set.
Pro 12:27, 13:11, 24:4 hon verses routed to 7585-002 (character→wealth). hon must be in VCG term set.
Pro 19:14, Pro 8:18, Psa 119:14 hon verses routed to 7586-002. hon must be in VCG term set.
Pro 28:22 hon (stingy hastens after wealth) routed to 7579-001. hon must be in VCG term set.
Pro 3:9 hon (honour Lord with wealth) routed to 7578-001. hon must be in VCG term set.
Psa 112:3 hon (wealth and riches in righteous person's house) routed to 681-001. hon must be in VCG term set.
Psa 44:12 hon (sold for a trifle) routed to 1142-001. hon must be in VCG term set.
Pro 11:16 o.sher (violent men get riches) routed to 7584-001. o.sher must be in VCG term set.
Ecc 4:8, 5:12 o.sher verses routed to 7010-001. o.sher must be in VCG term set.
Pro 13:7 and Pro 13:8 o.sher verses routed to 7577-001. o.sher must be in VCG term set.
Job 27:19 a.shir (goes to bed rich) routed to 7577-001. a.shir must be in VCG term set.
1Ti 6:17 ploutos (uncertain riches) routed to 7577-001. ploutos must be in VCG term set.
Rev 3:17 ptōchos (you are poor) routed to 7577-001 as the actual poverty of the self-assessed-rich. ptōchos must be in VCG term set.
2Cor 6:10 ptōchos (as poor yet making many rich) routed to 7580-001. ptōchos must be in VCG term set.
Rev 18:14 liparos (soul longed for delicacies) routed to 7581-001 as insatiability face. liparos must be in VCG term set.
Pro 10:15, Pro 18:11 a.shir verses routed to 7010-001 (imagined stronghold). a.shir must be in VCG term set.

plousios has verses routed to M46-D (reversal face: 2Cor 8:9, Jam 2:5, Rev 2:9)
plouteō has verses in M46-D (toward-God face: 2Cor 8:9, 1Ti 6:18, Rev 3:18, Rom 10:12)
ploutos has verses in M46-D (revaluation face: 2Cor 8:2, Heb 11:26)
ploutos has 1Ti 6:17 verse in M46-A (uncertain riches as disqualified hope-object)
ptōchos has verses in M46-B (poor as moral test of wealthy: Jam 2:2-3, Jam 2:6, Joh 12:6, Luk 16:20)
ptōchos has Rev 3:17 verse in M46-A (actual poverty of the self-assessed-rich Laodicea)
hon has verses in M46-A (Pro 11:4, Pro 28:22, Psa 44:12, Pro 1:13, Pro 10:15, Pro 13:7)
hon has verses in M46-C (Pro 8:18, Psa 112:3, Psa 119:14, Pro 12:27, Pro 13:11, Pro 19:14, Pro 24:4, Pro 28:8)
hon has verse in M46-D (Pro 3:9 — honour Lord with wealth)
o.sher has verses in M46-C (wisdom-gift face: Pro 3:16, 8:18, 22:4, Psa 112:3, 1Ki 3:11-13, 2Ch 1:11-12, 1Ch 29:12, Ecc 5:19)
o.sher has verse in M46-A (Pro 13:7 — pretends to be rich; false self-presentation)
a.shir has verses in M46-A (Job 27:19 — goes to bed rich; Psa 49:2 — UT/new)
a.shir has verses in M46-C (wisdom-examination face: Pro 22:2, Pro 28:6, Ecc 10:6)
a.shar has verses in M46-A (moral failure face: Job 15:29, Pro 13:7, Pro 21:17, Pro 28:20, Psa 49:16, Hos 12:8, Zec 11:5, Jer 5:27)
a.shar has verses in M46-D (refusal face: Gen 14:23, Pro 23:4)
da.shen has Deu 31:20 verse in M46-A (grown fat → apostasy)
da.shen has Pro 15:30 verse in M46-D (good news refreshes bones — received blessing)
sha.a.nan has 413-002 verses in M46-D (divine secure quietness: Isa 32:18)
sha.men adj has Isa 30:23 verse in M46-C (eschatological divine provision as rich bread)

section_C_h7_liparos_vcg.description: Term names the luxurious goods of Babylon as the object of the soul's longing — 'your soul longed for all your delicacies (liparos) and your splendors, lost to you never to be found again' (Rev 18:14). The soul (psuchē) oriented toward material luxury names the insatiability and deceitfulness face of the wealth domain: the inner person whose desire was attached to the richness of Babylon mourns its loss. Single-verse term; anchor set for R4 compliance.
section_C_h7_liparos_vcg.note: After creating this VCG, remove liparos from VCG 7581-001 term set if the H3 fix added it there. Rev 18:14 should be re-routed from group_id=3709 to group_id=(new liparos VCG id).

section_D_vcnew_ut_verses.basis: The rich man of Nathan's parable introduced — a.shir names the character whose inner moral failure (failure of pity toward poor man) is the subject of the parable. Parable opening establishing the a.shir as moral category. M46-B + 7584-001.
Rich man had very many flocks and herds — the abundance of the a.shir that makes his subsequent failure of pity inexcusable. Abundance coexisting with hardness is the M46-B pattern. M46-B + 7584-001.

Both low and high, rich (a.shir) and poor together addressed in wisdom Psalm whose subject is the inner danger of trusting in wealth (Psa 49:6-12). a.shir is the audience of a teaching that directly challenges the inner orientation of the wealthy. M46-B + 7584-001.

King Ahasuerus showing the riches (o.sher) of his royal glory for 180 days — public display of material wealth as self-glorification and status-claim. The o.sher-as-self-display pattern; same register as Haman in Est 5:11. M46-B + 7586-001.

section_E_vcrevise_p_verses.basis: Houses full of deceit, therefore became great and rich — a.shar through moral corruption (deceit); the inner orientation of deceit producing enrichment. M46-A + 7585-001 (drive to become rich as moral failure).
Let not the rich man (a.shir) boast in his riches — boasting in wealth as the specific inner temptation of the a.shir; self-glorification through material status. M46-B + 7584-001.
Let not the rich man boast in his riches (o.sher) — o.sher as the object of prohibited boasting; same inner act as Psa 49:6 already in 7586-001. M46-B + 7586-001.

Riches (o.sher) got not by justice will leave in mid-life; ends as a fool — unjustly accumulated o.sher that proves transient and self-destructive. M46-B + 7586-001 (o.sher as insatiable/unreliable/alienating).
Haman recounted the splendour of his riches (o.sher) — inner act of recounting o.sher as self-glorification and status reinforcement. M46-B + 7586-001 (already in VCG description).
I am rich (a.shar) I found wealth, they cannot find iniquity in me — self-declared wealth as false moral vindication; self-deception through material prosperity. M46-A + 7585-001.
Second vc_id for Jer 5:27 a.shar — same routing as vr_id=237983. M46-A + 7585-001.
Full stomach of the rich will not let him sleep — inner-physical restlessness produced by abundance; the a.shir who cannot rest. M46-B + 7584-001.
Second vc_id for Ecc 5:12 a.shir — same routing. M46-B + 7584-001.
Second vc_id for Jer 9:23 a.shir — same routing. M46-B + 7584-001.
Second vc_id for Est 5:11 o.sher — same routing. M46-B + 7586-001.
Second vc_id for Jer 9:23 o.sher — same routing. M46-B + 7586-001.
Second vc_id for Jer 17:11 o.sher — same routing. M46-B + 7586-001.
